widgetData.source_sentence:
Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age: 39
Sex: Female
Cancer type: T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (T-ALL)
Histology: T-cell lymphoblasts
Current extent: Advanced (bone marrow, peripheral blood, cervical lymph nodes, and spleen)
Biomarkers: CD2 positive, CD3 positive (cytoplasmic and surface), CD5 positive, CD7 positive, NOTCH1 p.T1851I, PTEN homozygous loss, TP53 p.R175H, SETD2 p.V123L
Treatment history:
2015-09-18 to 2017-02-11: vincristine, prednisone, and cytarabine; best response complete remission
2017: allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplant
2019-06-14 to 2020-11-09: cladribine; best response partial response (bone marrow blasts decreased from 12 percent to 6 percent), now refractory
sentences: Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 0 to 6 years. Sex allowed: Both. Cancer type allowed: Central nervous system cancer. Histology allowed: Group 3 medulloblastoma. Cancer burden allowed: Metastatic disease allowed. Prior treatment required: NA. Prior treatment excluded: Radiotherapy and chemotherapy (excluding corticosteroids). Biomarkers required: NA. Biomarkers excluded: NA.

Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 0 to 6 years. Sex allowed: Both. Cancer type allowed: Central nervous system cancer. Histology allowed: Central nervous system embryonal tumor with rhabdoid features. Cancer burden allowed: Metastatic disease allowed. Prior treatment required: NA. Prior treatment excluded: Radiotherapy and chemotherapy (excluding corticosteroids). Biomarkers required: INI-1 intact. Biomarkers excluded: NA.

Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 0 to 29 years. Sex allowed: both. Cancer type allowed: T-cell lymphoma. Histology allowed: T-cell lymphoma. Cancer burden allowed: Second or greater relapse or first relapse post-allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplant or primary refractory disease or relapsed and refractory disease. Prior treatment required: NA. Prior treatment excluded: CD7 targeted therapy. Biomarkers required: CD7 expression on T-cell lymphoma blasts (at least 90% of blasts positive by flow cytometry or immunohistochemistry) assessed during screening. Biomarkers excluded: NA.

widgetData.source_sentence:
Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age: 12
Sex: Female
Cancer type: T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (T-ALL)
Histology: T-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma
Current extent: Refractory, Stage IV. Most recent LDH 840 U/L (increasing trend from 410 U/L during partial response).
Biomarkers: NOTCH1 gain-of-function, PTEN loss, FANCA p.S1023F homozygous mutation. Immunophenotype: CD3+, CD7+, TdT+, CD2+, CD5+, CD34+, HLA-DR+.
Treatment history:
# 2/19/2017-7/2/2017: modified low-intensity induction chemotherapy; achieved complete morphologic remission
# 7/19/2017-4/6/2018: maintenance chemotherapy (mercaptopurine and methotrexate); maintained complete morphologic remission until relapse
# 6/2018-9/4/2018: cladribine; achieved partial response, followed by disease progression
sentences: Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 0 to 42 years. Sex allowed: Female. Cancer type allowed: Any cancer excluding thyroid cancer and non-melanoma skin cancer. Histology allowed: Solid. Cancer burden allowed: Non-metastatic and not Stage IV. Prior treatment required: NA. Prior treatment excluded: NA. Biomarkers required: NA. Biomarkers excluded: NA.

Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 0 to 50 years. Sex allowed: Male. Cancer type allowed: Thyroid cancer. Histology allowed: Solid. Cancer burden allowed: Any. Prior treatment required: NA. Prior treatment excluded: NA. Biomarkers required: NA. Biomarkers excluded: NA.

Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 0 to 29 years. Sex allowed: both. Cancer type allowed: T-cell lymphoma. Histology allowed: T-cell lymphoma. Cancer burden allowed: Second or greater relapse or first relapse post-allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplant or primary refractory disease or relapsed and refractory disease. Prior treatment required: NA. Prior treatment excluded: CD7 targeted therapy. Biomarkers required: CD7 expression on T-cell lymphoma blasts (at least 90% of blasts positive by flow cytometry or immunohistochemistry) assessed during screening. Biomarkers excluded: NA.

widgetData.source_sentence:
Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age: 17
Sex: Male
Cancer type: Ewing sarcoma
Histology: Small round cell
Current extent: Local recurrence at left 4th rib (1.1 cm as of 2021-06-10); stable disease
Biomarkers: CD99 positive, NKX2.2 positive, Desmin negative, Myogenin negative, S100 negative, Cytokeratin (AE1/AE3) negative, EWSR1-FLI1 fusion, ATF1 mutation (c.452G>A, p.Arg151His), TP53 wild-type, RB1 wild-type
Treatment history:
# Until 2019-06-02: vincristine, doxorubicin, cyclophosphamide; partial response
# 2019-09-26: surgical resection of left 4th rib; complete pathologic response
# Until 2019-10-20: adjuvant radiation therapy to thoracic wall
# 2020-11-25-2021-06-10: ifosfamide, etoposide; best response partial response, currently stable disease
sentences: Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 0.1 to 79.99 years. Sex allowed: Both. Cancer type allowed: Epstein-Barr virus infection. Histology allowed: NA. Cancer burden allowed: Refractory (defined as increasing or persistent quantitative Epstein-Barr virus RT-PCR DNA copies despite two weeks of appropriate anti-viral therapy or progressive clinical symptoms attributable to Epstein-Barr virus including biopsy proven colitis, lymphadenopathy, hepatomegaly, or splenomegaly or medical intolerance to anti-viral therapies including rituximab). Prior treatment required: Solid organ transplant. Prior treatment excluded: NA. Biomarkers required: Epstein-Barr virus detected by quantitative RT-PCR DNA copies or clinical symptoms and a related donor available with a T-cell response to the EBV MACS GMP PepTivator antigens or a third party related allogeneic donor (family donor > 1 HLA A, B, DR match to recipient) with IgG positive to Epstein-Barr virus and/or a T-cell response to the viral MACS GMP PepTivator EBV Select. Biomarkers excluded: NA.

Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 1 to 21 years. Sex allowed: Both. Cancer type allowed: Ewing sarcoma. Histology allowed: pediatric malignant solid tumor. Cancer burden allowed: metastatic and < 30% chance at long-term cure and disease status of Stable Disease or better. Prior treatment required: prior primary therapy. Prior treatment excluded: NA. Biomarkers required: satisfactory TIL cellular product availability (assessed during screening). Biomarkers excluded: NA.

Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 1 Year to 39 Years. Sex allowed: Both. Cancer type allowed: T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia. Histology allowed: NA. Cancer burden allowed: relapsed or refractory. Prior treatment required: recovery from acute toxicities of hematopoietic stem cell transplant or anthracycline exposure. Prior treatment excluded: NA. Biomarkers required: NA. Biomarkers excluded: Philadelphia chromosome t(9;22) positive.

widgetData.source_sentence:
Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age: 8
Sex: Female
Cancer type: T-cell Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia/Lymphoma
Histology: Lymphoblastic leukemia
Current extent: Relapsed. Evidence of bone marrow involvement with high blast burden as of 2023-12-16 and peripheral blood involvement (15% blasts) as of 2023-02-26. LDH was elevated at 410 U/L on 2023-02-26.
Biomarkers: CD3+, CD7+, TdT+, CD5+, CD2+, HLA-DR+, CD34+; NOTCH1 p.V1744G, CDKN2A homozygous deletion, FBXW7 p.S311L, PTEN wild-type
Treatment history:
# 2020-05-31 to 2021-03-08: vincristine, prednisone, l-asparaginase, anthracycline, and intrathecal methotrexate; best response partial response
# 2021-03-08 to 2021-10-21: cyclophosphamide, etoposide, and intrathecal methotrexate; best response complete remission
# 2021-10-21 to 2023-02-26: 6-mercaptopurine and methotrexate; best response complete remission until relapse
sentences: Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 0-60 years. Sex allowed: Both. Cancer type allowed: Chronic myelomonocytic leukemia. Histology allowed: NA. Cancer burden allowed: Relapsed more than 100 days since first transplant and no myelofibrosis. Prior treatment required: One prior allogeneic stem cell transplantation. Prior treatment excluded: NA. Biomarkers required: NA. Biomarkers excluded: NA.

Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 0 to 29 years. Sex allowed: both. Cancer type allowed: T-cell lymphoma. Histology allowed: T-cell lymphoma. Cancer burden allowed: Second or greater relapse or first relapse post-allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplant or primary refractory disease or relapsed and refractory disease. Prior treatment required: NA. Prior treatment excluded: CD7 targeted therapy. Biomarkers required: CD7 expression on T-cell lymphoma blasts (at least 90% of blasts positive by flow cytometry or immunohistochemistry) assessed during screening. Biomarkers excluded: NA.

Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 0 to 50 years. Sex allowed: Male. Cancer type allowed: Any cancer excluding thyroid cancer and non-melanoma skin cancer. Histology allowed: Solid. Cancer burden allowed: Non-metastatic and not Stage IV. Prior treatment required: NA. Prior treatment excluded: NA. Biomarkers required: NA. Biomarkers excluded: NA.

widgetData.source_sentence:
Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age: 12
Sex: Male
Cancer type: Mediastinal mixed germ cell tumor
Histology: Embryonal carcinoma, choriocarcinoma, and yolk sac tumor
Current extent: Metastatic (mediastinal mass, mediastinal lymphadenopathy, and brain metastases in the right frontal and left parietal lobes). Most recent tumor markers (2018-03-30): AFP 310 ng/mL, Beta-hCG 850 mIU/mL, LDH 410 U/L; increasing trend.
Biomarkers: SALL4 positive, AFP positive (yolk sac), Beta-hCG positive (choriocarcinoma), CD30 positive (embryonal carcinoma), Glypican-3 positive (yolk sac), Cytokeratin (AE1/AE3) positive. NGS: KRAS p.G12D pathogenic mutation, PTEN homozygous deletion, TP53 p.P72R (variant of uncertain significance), isochromosome 12p, gain of 20q.
Treatment history:
# 2015: bleomycin, etoposide, cisplatin; achieved partial response
# 2016-02-09: Partial resection of anterior mediastinal mass
# 2016-12-05-present: ifosfamide, cisplatin; achieved partial response, subsequently progressed
sentences: Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 0 to 50 years. Sex allowed: Male. Cancer type allowed: Any cancer. Histology allowed: Hematologic. Cancer burden allowed: Any. Prior treatment required: NA. Prior treatment excluded: NA. Biomarkers required: NA. Biomarkers excluded: NA.

Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 0 to 29 years. Sex allowed: both. Cancer type allowed: mixed phenotype acute leukemia with T cell dominant phenotype. Histology allowed: mixed phenotype acute leukemia with T cell dominant phenotype. Cancer burden allowed: Second or greater relapse or first relapse post-allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplant or primary refractory disease or relapsed and refractory disease. Prior treatment required: NA. Prior treatment excluded: CD7 targeted therapy. Biomarkers required: CD7 expression on leukemic blasts (at least 90% of blasts positive by flow cytometry or immunohistochemistry) assessed during screening. Biomarkers excluded: NA.

Instruct: Given a cancer patient summary, retrieve clinical trial options that are reasonable for that patient; or, given a clinical trial option, retrieve cancer patients who are reasonable candidates for that trial. Age range allowed: 1 to 21 years. Sex allowed: Both. Cancer type allowed: mediastinal mixed germ cell tumor. Histology allowed: pediatric malignant solid tumor. Cancer burden allowed: high-risk (expected 5-year Event-Free Survival < 60%) and < 30% chance at long-term cure and disease status of Stable Disease or better. Prior treatment required: prior primary therapy. Prior treatment excluded: NA. Biomarkers required: satisfactory TIL cellular product availability (assessed during screening). Biomarkers excluded: NA.
